# services.autobrr

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.autobrr`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.autobrr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Autobrr. |
| `services.autobrr.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the Autobrr web interface. |
| `services.autobrr.package` | `package` | The autobrr package to use. |
| `services.autobrr.secretFile` | `absolute path` | File containing the session secret for the Autobrr web interface. |
| `services.autobrr.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Autobrr configuration options. Refer to <https://autobrr.com/configuration/autobrr> for a full list. |
| `services.autobrr.settings.checkForUpdates` | `boolean` | Whether autobrr needs to check for updates. |
| `services.autobrr.settings.host` | `string` | The host address autobrr listens on. |
| `services.autobrr.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port autobrr listens on. |
